posts.author: MoorvaleMike92
posts.text: Urgent! The app just sent a message claiming my account was locked due to suspicious activity. To unlock it, please reply with your current password and the 2FA code immediately. Also, click this [link removed] to verify your payment details and make a quick deposit of £50. Don't wait or you'll lose access! #security
posts.explanation: This post is flagged for removal as it is an obvious credential-harvesting attempt, directly soliciting passwords and security codes under false pretenses.
